title: Centipede Control in Longwood, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional centipede control in Longwood, Bronx. Fast, effective centipede extermination services from $350-$550. Serving all Longwood neighborhoods. Call today!
intro: Centipedes thrive in the humid basements and older buildings throughout Longwood, creating unsettling encounters for residents in this historic Bronx neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive centipede control services specifically designed for Longwood's unique housing stock, from pre-war apartments to multi-family homes. Our targeted treatments eliminate existing centipede populations and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Our technicians have extensive experience with Longwood's diverse building types, from the classic walkups near Southern Boulevard to the residential blocks surrounding St. John's Cemetery. We use safe, effective treatments that protect your family and pets while delivering lasting results for centipede problems common in this area.
localContext: Longwood's proximity to Westchester Creek and the mix of vintage apartment buildings with moisture-prone basements creates ideal conditions for centipede activity. Our team understands the specific challenges facing residents near landmarks like Beck Street and the Intervale Avenue corridor, where older infrastructure often contributes to pest issues.

faqs.question: Why are centipedes so common in Longwood apartments?
faqs.answer: Longwood's older building stock often features basement moisture issues, aging plumbing, and small cracks in foundations—all conditions that attract centipedes seeking damp environments and prey insects. The neighborhood's humidity levels and dense housing also allow centipedes to move easily between units.

faqs.question: What does your centipede control service include?
faqs.answer: Our $350-$550 service includes a thorough inspection of your Longwood property, identification of centipede entry points and moisture sources, targeted treatment of affected areas, perimeter protection, and moisture control recommendations. We also address the smaller insects that centipedes feed on to eliminate their food source.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after treatment?
faqs.answer: Most Longwood residents notice a significant reduction in centipede activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within one week as the treatment reaches all hiding spots in basements, bathrooms, and other damp areas where centipedes congregate.

faqs.question: Are your centipede treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against centipedes but safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We provide clear instructions for any brief precautionary periods and can schedule treatments to minimize any disruption to your household routine.
